content.en:
Thundered!!!

Many Legendary Realm Lords of the True Sacred Land took action to surround the clone of the Star Lord, blocking time and space, and not giving the Star Lord any hope of escaping.

"I failed the attack!"

The Tricky Star Lord was stunned, but he went all out, and he didn't kill Ye Tian with one blow.

He also saw that Ye Tian actually had the defensive time supreme skill, and he also had the supreme legendary body, which blocked his full force and did not die.

Moreover, Ye Tian could even fight back against him, and what he used was an attack-type time supreme skill.

In addition, Ye Tian also performed a speed body type of time supreme skill.

It can be said that in a short period of time, Ye Tian has displayed three supreme skills!

A half-step Legendary Realm Lord who has just broken through has unleashed three supreme skills.

And as an ancient Legendary Realm Lord who has broken through the Legendary Realm Lord for countless eternal years, he can only use one supreme skill.

For him, mastering a supreme skill is already remarkable, and he has always been very proud.

But this time, he was really hit.

"Half-step Legendary Realm Lord, control time, three time supreme skills, supreme legendary body, how could such a demon be born in the void region?"

The Star Lord felt that his cognition had been shattered, and he couldn't believe it.

At this time, he remembered the reminder of the border lord, the border lord said that the endless lord is not ordinary, not an ordinary legendary lord, maybe it is very promising, maybe it has something to do with a certain great existence.157 series.

Now, he believes!

After all, Ye Tian was able to condense the Supreme Legend, and he must have obtained the Kuhai Gravel, the Time River Bead, and the Time and Space Ancient Leaf, and as far as he knew, the Time and Space Ancient Leaf seemed to be only available to the white-bearded old man.

Of course, there are Eternal Masters.

Therefore, Ye Tian either had a relationship with the Eternal Controller, or with the white-bearded old man.

No matter what the situation is, it is enough to prove that Ye Tian is really extraordinary, and the origin is not as simple as he investigated.

Ye Tian has three time supreme skills and supreme legendary bodies, and he also controls time, he can't kill Ye Tian at all.

The assassination is almost ridiculous, and don't think about killing Ye Tian in the future.

However, he is not reconciled!

At this time, the Dragon Gu Lord had already turned into his main body, turning into a billion-strong primordial ancestral dragon, and countless scales had turned into his strongest defense.

Boom!

The Star Lord bombarded the Dragon Ancient Lord's body with one blow, and was directly bounced away, the Dragon Ancient Lord's defense was too strong, and his attack could not break through the Dragon Ancient Lord's defense.

He was not surprised by this.

All along, the Dragon Gu Lord has been a little stronger than him, and in terms of defense, it is the Dragon Gu Lord's advantage, and he can't break the Dragon Gu Lord's defense.

But suddenly, I seemed dumbfounded.

I saw that the claws of the Dragon Gu Lord were clawed, and this claw contained an incomparable mystical time power.

Many of the Time Domains on the Star Lord were directly shattered, and the claws attacked the Star Lord's body one after another, breaking through his legendary body.

The body of the Star Lord turned into countless streamers, converging in another place, but there was a wound on his body.

"How so?"

The Star Lord was dumbfounded.

This is clearly a supreme skill, and the offensive time is the supreme skill.

But the key is that the Dragon Gu Lord has never realized an offensive time supreme skill, only a defensive time supreme skill, so the defense is invincible, and it is difficult for other powerful Legendary Realm Lords to defeat the Dragon Gu Lord, but the Dragon Gu Lord has no way to defeat those Legendary Realm Lords who are not weak.

But now it's different, the Dragon Gu Lord has actually realized an attack-type time supreme skill, even if it is a little rough, but it is also a time supreme skill!

With two time supreme skills, the strength of the Dragon Gu Lord skyrocketed a lot, completely surpassing him.

This moment.

The Star Lord was envious and jealous, if he could also comprehend the two supreme skills, how good would it be?

Unfortunately, he didn't get it.

However, what the Star Lord didn't know was that the Dragon Gu Lord was still far from comprehending the second supreme skill. So not long ago, he finally comprehended the second supreme technique with the help of three thousand kites, so that his strength increased greatly.

Not only has his strength increased greatly, but the other Legendary Realm Lords of the True Saintless Land have all increased their strength to a greater or lesser extent

For example, the Lord of the Wasteland River has also comprehended a supreme skill, and has changed from an ordinary Legendary Realm Lord to a powerful Legendary Realm Lord with the highest eternal technique.

Boom Boom Boom !!!

The attacks of one Legendary Realm Lord after another covered him, and he was soon severely damaged.

In a short time, the clone of the Star Lord was completely shattered and annihilated.

Somewhere in the Void Zone.

The body of the Star Lord showed a wry smile, the clone was killed, and Ye Tian was not dead.

It can be said that the losses in this attack were large.

The key is, don't think about killing Ye Tian in the future.

"Endless Lord, what is your identity?"

He was a little scared.

If the Endless Lord had a relationship with the Whitebeard Old Man or the Eternal Master, would his life be in danger?

Moreover, even if Ye Tian grows up in the future, he is no longer an opponent, in case one day, Ye Tian becomes the peak Legendary Realm Lord, he will even be easily killed by Ye Tian.

At this moment, where would the Star Lord still think about revenge!

At this time, life preservation is the most important thing!

"Let's retreat here, if you don't break through to the peak of the Legendary Realm Lord, you will definitely not be able to get out!"

The Star Lord said secretly.

......

There is no holy place.

The Dragon Gu Lord asked with concern, "Endless Lord, are you okay?" "

"It's fine. "

Ye Tian shook his head and said.

The Frostless Lord asked, "Endless Lord, have you comprehended the Time Supreme Technique?"

"Yes!" Ye Tian didn't hide it, and he couldn't hide it, just now he used the Time Supreme Technique, and these Legendary Realm Lords would know it with a little probing.

"I have comprehended the three time supreme skills, the defense of the gate, the speed of the body, and the attack. "

Ye Tian said truthfully.

Many Legendary Realm Lords were dumbfounded one by one.Baiheng Lord and Frostless Lord, the two Legendary Realm Lords who had not yet realized the supreme skill, were suddenly envious, and some of them were shocked

The Dragon Gu Lord was also stimulated, and he finally comprehended the second supreme technique with the help of the three thousand iris, but he was told that Ye Tian had already comprehended the three time supreme techniques, and Ye Tiancai was a half-step Legendary Realm Lord!

If he waited for Ye Tian to break through to the Legendary Realm Lord level, wouldn't he be able to create more than seven or eight supreme techniques by himself?

This is too wicked!

Immediately, he immediately changed the topic: "Endless Lord, when are you going to attack the Legendary Realm Lord?"

Ye Tian said: "I'm going to go to the Time Chamber of Commerce to buy some Time Divine Water, and raise the cultivation and Supreme Legendary Body to the peak as soon as possible, and impact the Legendary Realm Lord in the best state, if I go to the impact now, I will inevitably have some unstable foundation." "

"That's fine, you can go. "

Lord Longgu nodded.

Immediately, Ye Tian stepped over and left, and went to the Time Firm. _
